$comment: One append-only gate-decision record in Diagnostic_State.meta.json execution.gate_events[]. See docs/runner-governed-execution.md Increment 5. The fields here are the STRUCTURAL contract (required minimum + enums + types) checked per-item by run_gate.py --check-state via apodictic_artifacts.validate_obj. The cross-field / fold invariants the stdlib subset checker cannot express — attestation coverage against the event's own attested_contract, migration-prefix integrity, finding_deltas clearing-only, checks[]/finding_deltas inner shapes, pointer==fold — live in gate-state (run_gate.py --check-state).
title: APODICTIC gate event (apodictic.gate_event.v1)

gate.$comment: manifest phases key; gate-state asserts membership
